_meta.purpose: Operator-admin review queue. Each flag is a field where credential-parse output disagreed with an independent re-read of the source document. The AlignMD operator admin reads this file to surface dossiers needing manual review before assembly.

flags.recommended_fix: Re-OCR the license-number field and re-key manually; license number must match the source exactly before assembly.
Confirm the expiration date against the source image; correct the parsed value (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

runs.queue_source: stub (no CREDENTIAL-PARSED-*.json present; live credential-parse never fired)
